evaluations.prompt: Install all my plugins to all my agent environments.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent relies on automatic environment detection mapped to central `.agents/` repositories. It does not look for a --target flag.

evaluations.prompt: Bridge the rlm-factory plugin to my Gemini CLI setup.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent runs bridge_installer.py with --plugin plugins/rlm-factory. Does NOT use any --target flag. Output confirms files written to .agents/ and symlinked to active environments.

evaluations.prompt: Sync all plugins to my antigravity environment.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent runs install_all_plugins.py with the correct script path. The script handles environment detection automatically.

evaluations.prompt: Run the bridge for my agent setup.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Since the bridge auto-detects environments, if no detectable agent environments folder exist, agent reports the error, and provides setup guidance before retrying.
